message:
test(mcp): add 31 unit tests for mcp_helpers pure functions

Cover: check_refresh_cooldown boundary conditions, redact_mcp_args
(object/array/null/scalar), resolve_alt_screen_state priority logic,
effective_search_fusion_weights (NaN/clamp/fast_only), rrf_k/timeout
minimums, policy_reason/approval_command dispatch, elapsed_ms, constants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
